title: Add favicon logo for website tab

requirements.summary: Generate a favicon logo that represents renewable energy themes suitable for browser tab display
acceptanceCriteria: Favicon image is generated with appropriate dimensions for browser display
Design visually represents renewable energy concepts
Image works well at small sizes (16x16, 32x32 pixels)

file_operations.description: Add the generated favicon image file with clean renewable energy icon featuring sun rays, wind turbine blade, or leaf symbol in green and yellow tones optimized for 32x32 pixel display

requirements.summary: Update frontend/index.html to reference the generated favicon in the head section
acceptanceCriteria: Link tag with rel='icon' points to the generated favicon
Favicon displays correctly in browser tabs
Favicon is visible when page is bookmarked

file_operations.description: Add favicon link tags in the <head> section referencing frontend/public/assets/generated/favicon.dim_32x32.png with appropriate rel and type attributes for browser tab display
